flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Western Illinois University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3k → 4.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Western Illinois University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (71.9% → 61.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Illinois University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.7k → $15.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Illinois University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.7k → $15.3k).
